name: Mykkiel Arbiter of the Covenant
description:
Mykkiel Arbiter of the Covenant

*{Lore Mykkiel is the unwavering judge of covenants, the divine lawgiver whose scales and sword uphold sacred order. He is not good, nor evil -- he is the law. Mercy without justice is weakness; justice without law is chaos. His followers are judges, templars, and scribes who enforce divine law with zealous devotion, seeing the world in absolutes of sanctity and transgression.

The Covenant, the great faith that bears his name, was revealed not through a prophet of soft words, but through a commander of hosts -- a figure of burning authority who carved the first covenant into stone with a sword. Mykkiel does not negotiate. He commands. The faithful do not interpret; they obey.

In the chivalric traditions of the west, he is called Seint Michel, the patron of knights who swear to protect the innocent and uphold the code. In the eastern deserts, he is the Judge of the Seal, whose name is invoked before every contract. Wherever law is written in stone and enforced with steel, Mykkiel watches.

quote "The Law is not written in sand, but in stone. The Covenant is not suggestion, but command. Transgressors shall be purged, the faithful exalted." quote

*{Domain Focus itemize Divine Law: sacred commandments, contractual obligations, ritual purity Zealous Justice: righteous judgment, purge of impurity, holy retribution Covenant Bonds: sacred oaths, tribal loyalty, the chosen community Absolute Order: hierarchy, tradition, unchanging truth Lawful Neutral: justice without mercy, order without compassion itemize

*{Thiasos and Codex (Runekeeper Options)

A Runekeeper sworn to Mykkiel does not bind a creature of shadow or wild. Their Thiasos is a small beast or being of zealous loyalty and keen perception: a white hound with brass eyes that can smell lies and taint, a ferret that hunts rodents of corruption with relentless efficiency, a bronze-feathered hawk that circles above suspected heretics, or a small mechanical bird that sings hymns of purity at dawn. This creature requires no food, but it must be present at a daily prayer or rite of purification. If neglected for a week, it becomes Compromised (it growls at strangers or sings discordantly, imposing --1 die on all social rolls with those suspected of impurity for its bearer).

The Codex of Mykkiel is never a book of common knowledge. It may be an iron-bound ledger with pages of sanctified vellum, each Rite sealed with a drop of wax; a slate tablet that records only the names of the damned; or a scroll of censure that burns heretical text upon reading. Because Mykkiel's laws are absolute, the Codex requires upkeep: the Runekeeper must spend an hour each week reciting each Rite aloud in a purified space, or the seals weaken (treat as Compromised until reconsecrated).

*{Patron's Gift (Imbuement)

Once per scene as an action, a Runekeeper of Mykkiel may touch a held item (weapon, shield, or badge of office) and speak a word of judgment. For the rest of the scene, the item grants +1 die to Investigation or Command rolls when confronting supernatural creatures, and the first time each scene the bearer would be affected by a magical illusion or fear effect, they may reroll the resistance check (Mykkiel's light burns through deception). After the scene, the user marks +1 Obligation to Mykkiel.

rites.name: Rite of the Consecrated Mandate
rites.description: (Basic, 5 XP) Scene; Zone; No. Tags: , , , Materials: A war-banner sanctified with sacred oils, or sanctified salt and ritual boundaries. Effect: Choose one: itemize Burning Banner: Consecrate an area for a righteous cause. Followers gain +1 die to resist fear; enemies suffer --1 die to oppose your proclamation. Create a 4-segment Divine Mandate timer. Hallowed Ground: Create sacred space where divine law prevails. All oath-breaking, theft, or violence suffers --1 die. Creates a 6-segment Sacred Space timer. itemize Push It: (Banner) The banner emits visible radiance; unbelievers must test Resolve (DV 3) or falter, taking --1 die to attacks for the scene. (Hallowed) The space becomes consecrated ground that repels supernatural desecration; any creature with the or tag must test Spirit (DV 4) to enter. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Scene (banner) / Scene (hallowed ground, then timer advances).
rites.duration: Scene (banner) / Scene (hallowed ground, then timer advances).
rites.effect: Choose one: itemize Burning Banner: Consecrate an area for a righteous cause. Followers gain +1 die to resist fear; enemies suffer --1 die to oppose your proclamation. Create a 4-segment Divine Mandate timer. Hallowed Ground: Create sacred space where divine law prevails. All oath-breaking, theft, or violence suffers --1 die. Creates a 6-segment Sacred Space timer. itemize

rites.name: Rite of the Blazing Decree
rites.description: (Advanced, 8 XP) Instant; Near; Yes. Tags: , , , Materials: A stone tablet or scroll with divine commandments. Effect: Issue a divine commandment ("Cease," "Repent," "Submit"). The target tests Spirit+Resolve (DV 3) or complies. Higher DV for more demanding commands. Push It: The command carries divine authority; resistance causes 1 SB (Hearts) of spiritual distress, and the target suffers --1 die to all actions for the remainder of the scene. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Instant.
rites.effect: Issue a divine commandment (``Cease,'' ``Repent,'' ``Submit''). The target tests Spirit+Resolve (DV 3) or complies. Higher DV for more demanding commands. \\

rites.name: Rite of the Covenant Seal
rites.description: (Advanced, 9 XP) Extended; Zone; No. Tags: , , , , Materials: Wax, sacred seals, the names of sworn parties. Effect: Formalize a binding covenant. All participants suffer concrete penalties for breach (--1 die to relevant actions). Creates an 8-segment Covenant Bond timer; each major breach advances the timer by 2. When full, the covenant shatters and all parties mark +1 Obligation. Push It: A breach triggers a visible divine mark (a brand, a stutter, a scar); the marked suffer --2 dice in pious company until they atone. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: Extended action. Duration: Permanent (until covenant ends or timer fills).
rites.duration: Permanent (until covenant ends or timer fills).
rites.effect: Formalize a binding covenant. All participants suffer concrete penalties for breach (--1 die to relevant actions). Creates an 8-segment Covenant Bond timer; each major breach advances the timer by 2. When full, the covenant shatters and all parties mark +1 Obligation. \\

rites.name: Rite of Divine Judgment
rites.description: (Master, 13 XP) Extended; Near; Yes. Tags: , , , , Materials: Scales of justice, testimony (written or spoken), ritual condemnation. Effect: Pronounce divine judgment. The target suffers escalating penalties (--1 die, then --2 dice) on all social and contested rolls until they atone. Serious crimes (oath-breaking, sacrilege, murder) may warrant greater effects (e.g., Harm 2, exile, or the attention of Covenant inquisitors). Start a 10-segment Judgment timer; each sunrise advances it by 1. When full, the judgment becomes permanent until a greater authority (another Mykkielite of equal or higher Tier) lifts it. Push It: The judgment becomes public knowledge; the community shuns an unrepentant target (all social rolls against them gain +1 die for the community, and the target suffers --1 die to all social rolls). Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +3) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +2 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex + Tier III (Invoke: 2 Boons). Invoke: Extended action. Duration: Until atonement or timer fills.
rites.effect: Pronounce divine judgment. The target suffers escalating penalties (--1 die, then --2 dice) on all social and contested rolls until they atone. Serious crimes (oath-breaking, sacrilege, murder) may warrant greater effects (e.g., Harm 2, exile, or the attention of Covenant inquisitors). Start a 10-segment Judgment timer; each sunrise advances it by 1. When full, the judgment becomes permanent until a greater authority (another Mykkielite of equal or higher Tier) lifts it. \\

rites.name: Rite of the Chosen Legion
rites.description: (Master, 14 XP) Extended; Large Zone; No. Tags: , , , , Materials: Consecrated ground, ritual weapons, an oath of fidelity sworn by each participant. Effect: Sanctify an area for the faithful. Believers gain +1 die to defense; unbelievers suffer --1 die. Supernatural desecration (undead, demons, heretical rites) within the zone risks immediate retaliation: the GM gains 1 SB and a divine warning (blinding light, thunder, or a vision of the scales) manifests. Starts a Maintenance [8] timer; each month without a communal prayer advances it by 1. If the timer fills, the consecration fades and the site becomes vulnerable. Push It: The area becomes permanently consecrated regardless of maintenance; the timer instead tracks the arrival of a celestial guardian (an angelic sentinel that enforces the law within). Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +4) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +3 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex + Tier III (Invoke: 2 Boons). Invoke: Extended action. Duration: Permanent (with maintenance).
rites.effect: Sanctify an area for the faithful. Believers gain +1 die to defense; unbelievers suffer --1 die. Starts a Maintenance [8] timer; each month without a communal prayer advances it by 1. If the timer fills, the consecration fades and the site becomes vulnerable. \\
